assertions.assertion: Sets RequireRequestObject = true on the client
Configures a ClientSecret with Type set to IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.JsonWebKey or IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64
Explains that JAR wraps authorization request parameters in a signed JWT making them tamperproof
assertions.rationale: Explains JAR wraps parameters in signed JWT, tamperproof.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the same key can be shared between client authentication (private_key_jwt) and JAR
assertions.rationale: Mentions same key for private_key_jwt and JAR.
